title: Audience Profile Schema
description: Defines the knowledge level, attention span, vocabulary, and engagement expectations for a specific audience tier. Audience Profiles have the lowest priority in the override hierarchy — they are overridden by all other profile types.

description.description: One-sentence description of this audience tier.

typical_prior_exposure.description: How much exposure this audience has had to the topic area. e.g. 'none', 'casual news consumer', 'active hobbyist'.

cultural_context_assumption.description: How much shared cultural context to assume. high = can reference cultural touchstones without explanation.

assumed_knowledge_level.description: What the audience already knows about the topic. Script should not re-explain things at this level.

jargon_tolerance.description: How much technical or domain-specific language is acceptable without definition.

explanation_depth.description: How deeply to explain concepts. 'surface' = what, not why. 'deep' = mechanisms and implications.

citation_expectation.description: How much source attribution this audience expects.

nuance_tolerance.description: Whether this audience can hold ambiguity. 'low' = clear conclusions required. 'high' = comfortable with 'we don't know'.

vocabulary_level.description: Vocabulary complexity to use in scripts.

analogy_reliance.description: How often to use analogies and comparisons to familiar concepts. 'high' for beginners.

recap_frequency.description: How often to recap or summarize key points within the video.

attention_span_model.description: Expected attention persistence. 'very_short' = needs re-engagement every 30-60s. 'very_long' = tolerates deep dives.

hook_sensitivity.description: How critical the first 30 seconds are for this audience. Expert audiences tolerate slow builds.

trust_building_requirement.description: How much the audience needs to trust the creator before engaging deeply. 'immediate' = new audience, skeptical.

engagement_triggers.description: What motivates this audience. e.g. ['surprising facts', 'personal relevance', 'social proof', 'mystery'].

emotional_range.description: How wide an emotional range this audience responds to. 'narrow' = keep it measured.

pacing_preference.description: Audience-level pacing guidance. Lowest priority in override hierarchy.

tolerance_for_silence.description: 'very_low' = silence triggers skip. 'high' = silence is appreciated for reflection.

tolerance_for_repetition.description: Whether this audience tolerates recap or repetition of key points.

self_contained_required.description: If true, every video must make sense without prior channel context.

outro_cta_style.description: How to pitch the next video. e.g. 'soft suggestion', 'direct ask', 'embedded question'.
